In good hands, from the very first visit

Expert care for pain, injury and movement problems for any joint or muscle, drawing on a wide range of disciplines to find what is really going on and to resolve the persistent issues that have not settled on their own.

FOR ALL • ALL AGES • EVERY STAGE OF LIFE
Contact us
Who we help · short intro · plain problem language for people and for AI answer engines: this paragraph is quotable as a direct answer to "who are SPORTS CLINICAL" Who we help

Most people find us when something is not right and getting in the way: a back that will not ease, a shoulder that has stopped cooperating, a knee or ankle that no longer feels reliable, an injury taking too long to heal, or a problem that has been quietly there for years. Whatever brought you, the aim is the same. To understand what is actually going on, and to help you move and feel better, properly and for the long term.

What we help with · the SEO portal · each tile is a future condition page targeting a searched phrase; this is where "physio"-intent traffic lands via the condition pages
What we help with

Common reasons people come to us

Back pain › Neck pain & headaches › Sports injuries › Chronic & persistent pain › Stiffness & limited movement › Stress & anxiety › Neurological conditions › Recovery & rehabilitation ›

Knee, shoulder, hip, ankle, elbow, wrist, jaw, rib: whatever the area, and whether it began with sport, an accident, a fall or gradually over time, if it hurts, will not move properly, or has never felt right since an injury, one of these will fit. Not sure which? Get in touch and we will point you the right way.

Discovery band · the one moment of depth on this page · implication through specificity, no method names · tensegrity model photo: the connected-system idea made physical Why people come to us when other things have not worked

We look further than the place that hurts

The body works as one connected system, and the way you move, hold tension and recover is shaped by far more than the single sore spot. So we take time to assess how the whole system is working, find what is really driving the problem, and build a plan around that. It is a more considered way of working, and it is often why people who have tried other things find something different here.

More about our approach ›
How we help · the locked eight services, locked order, framed by benefit · each links to a service page
How we help

Care matched to you, not to a fixed menu

From hands-on treatment to rehabilitation, performance and longer-term wellbeing, eight strands of care work together around what you actually need.

Advanced Sports Therapy

Assessment and hands-on treatment for injury, pain and performance.

Clinical Remedial Massage

Targeted soft-tissue work for pain, tension and recovery.

Pain & Injury Support

Finding and treating the cause of pain that keeps coming back.

Movement & Mobility Care

Restoring ease, range and confidence in how you move.

Integrated Rehabilitation

Structured recovery from injury, surgery or long-standing problems.

Performance & Wellbeing

For athletes and active people who want more from their body.

Integrated Lifestyle Medicine

Sleep, stress, movement and habits, addressed as one picture.

Medical Acupuncture

Evidence-informed acupuncture for pain and muscular problems.

Recognised and accountable

Held to recognised professional standards

Members and registrants of the Royal Society of Medicine, the Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council, the Institute for Functional Medicine, the Society of Sports Therapists, the Institute of Sport and Remedial Massage and the British Medical Acupuncture Society, among others.

Feel better, Move better, Live well

Most people come to us by personal recommendation, and the easiest first step is a conversation. Tell us what is going on and we will talk you through whether and how we can help, with no pressure at all.

Get in touch
Integrated care for movement, function and wellbeing at every stage of life
